title: Nigeria Set to Harness 6GHz Band for Wi-Fi 6 Applications - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigeria is set to join the league of countries utilizing the 6GHz band for Wi-Fi 6 applications, following the Nigerian Communications Commission's (NCC) Annual Stakeholders’ Consultative Forum on Emerging Technologies held in Lagos. Dr. Aminu Maida, NCC's Executive Vice Chairman/CEO, emphasized the commission's strategic focus areas, including people, collaboration, data, compliance, and digitalization. "We took
html: Nigeria is set to join the league of countries utilizing the 6GHz band for Wi-Fi 6 applications, following the Nigerian Communications Commission’s (NCC) Annual Stakeholders’ Consultative Forum on Emerging Technologies held in Lagos.
